headline: South Africa first agent baseline (rotation backfill). Functional band sustained at 50.0 with sub-threshold downward pressure. Compound 2025-2026 evidence: (1) HRW World Report 2026 documents whistleblower attacks and killings (Mafole, Van Der Merwe 2025) with Whistleblower Protection Bill still not passed; (2) GNU coalition government under Ramaphosa established Madlanga Commission July 2025 investigating criminal-syndicate infiltration of justice system (police, prosecutors, judiciary, intelligence, politicians) — POSITIVE accountability signal; (3) Operation Dudula xenophobic vigilantism: harassment of migrants, denial of hospital access, infant death July 2025; (4) Five-year accountability gap on Fikile Ntshangase environmental-activist murder (October 2020); (5) February 12 2026 SONA Ramaphosa repeated Whistleblower Protection Bill commitment; (6) April 27 2026 African Commission press release on xenophobic vigilante conduct. Half-step down on EMP (whistleblower-killing pattern + xenophobic violence) and INT (commitment-implementation gap on whistleblower bill) offset by ACC (Madlanga Commission as positive accountability signal). Net: sub-threshold drift, ~-3.0 points; functional band sustained. Recommend confirm at 50.0 with first-baseline rationale and boundary-case approval (downward pressure documented).
key_evidence: HRW World Report 2026 South Africa chapter: whistleblower attacks and killings; 2025 killings of Mpho Mafole and Marius Van Der Merwe; Whistleblower Protection Bill not yet passed.

July 2025: Ramaphosa established Madlanga Commission investigating criminal-syndicate infiltration of criminal justice system (police, prosecutors, judiciary, intelligence services, politicians) following KZN provincial police commissioner allegations.
Operation Dudula xenophobic vigilante group: harassment of migrants, denial of hospital and clinic access, July 2025 infant death after one-year-old denied treatment.
Fikile Ntshangase environmental-activist murder (October 2020): five-year accountability gap as of October 2025; HRW flagged as ongoing impunity.
February 12 2026 SONA: Ramaphosa repeated Whistleblower Protection Bill introduction commitment (compliance/implementation pending).
April 27 2026 African Commission on Human and Peoples' Rights press release deploring xenophobic attacks and vigilante conduct against nationals of other African countries in South Africa.
GNU coalition government context (post-2024 election): structural-coalition accountability dynamic functional but stress-tested by ANC-DA coordination.

evidence.finding: Comprehensive 2025-2026 human-rights baseline; whistleblower-attack pattern; Madlanga Commission; Operation Dudula; Ntshangase impunity gap.

evidence.source: HRW — South Africa: Whistleblowers Under Attack
evidence.finding: Whistleblower-killing pattern and Whistleblower Protection Bill non-passage detail.

evidence.source: African Commission on Human and Peoples' Rights — Xenophobic attacks press release
evidence.finding: April 27 2026 regional-body press release deploring xenophobic vigilante conduct in South Africa.

evidence.source: Presidency — Address by President Cyril Ramaphosa at National Conference on 30 Years of Human Rights
evidence.finding: Public address acknowledging 30-year human-rights record and challenges; declarative commitment.

evidence.source: JURIST — Rights group calls on South Africa to protect whistleblowers

scoring_rationale.AWR: 3.0 confirmed. A1 detection: civic-space and free-press functional through HRW/AC reporting; A4 amplification: civil-society pressure on whistleblower bill demonstrates harm-signal amplification.
scoring_rationale.EMP: 3.0 confirmed. E1 affective resonance: Ramaphosa public addresses acknowledge harm-patterns; E5 receptivity: African Commission press release received without state denial. Sub-threshold drift considered for whistleblower-killing pattern and xenophobic violence.
scoring_rationale.ACT: 3.0 confirmed. AC2 proportionality: Madlanga Commission is proportionate state-action response to systemic infiltration; AC4 response: incident-response on xenophobic violence reactive and incomplete.
scoring_rationale.EQU: 2.5 confirmed. EQ2 distributional awareness: xenophobic violence concentrated on African migrants; whistleblower vulnerability concentrated on civil servants; structural inequality persistent.
scoring_rationale.BND: 3.5 confirmed. B3 scope clarity: constitutional human-rights framework operational; B5 consent: judicial-review and HRC consultation processes functional. Operation Dudula extra-state vigilantism is BND-erosive sub-threshold.
scoring_rationale.ACC: 3.0 confirmed. AB2 transparency: HRW, OHCHR, African Commission engagement functional; Madlanga Commission positive accountability signal. AB4 reparation: Whistleblower Protection Bill non-passage is reparation-framework gap.
scoring_rationale.SYS: 3.0 confirmed. S1 causal reasoning: Madlanga Commission applies systemic reasoning at criminal-justice infiltration level; whistleblower-protection persistent gap.
scoring_rationale.INT: 3.0 confirmed. I1 consistency: declared commitments (Whistleblower Protection Bill multiple-SONA repetition) contradicted by non-passage; I2 non-performance: implementation gap is INT-erosive sub-threshold.

math_check.validator_check: Reconstruction confirms 50.0. Functional band sustained. Confirm with first-baseline rationale and boundary-case approval; sub-threshold downward pressure documented (~-3.0 reconstructed). 60-day re-evaluation if Whistleblower Protection Bill not introduced or if xenophobic-violence pattern escalates.

negativeSignals: Whistleblower-killing pattern (Mafole, Van Der Merwe 2025); Whistleblower Protection Bill non-passage despite multi-SONA commitment; Operation Dudula xenophobic vigilantism with infant death July 2025; Fikile Ntshangase 5-year impunity gap; African Commission April 2026 press release deploring xenophobic violence; criminal-syndicate infiltration of justice system requiring Madlanga Commission.
positiveSignals: Madlanga Commission established July 2025 — proactive accountability framework for systemic infiltration; HRW/OHCHR/AC engagement functional; civic-space and free-press operational; judicial-review functionality preserved; GNU coalition-government accountability dynamic functional; Ramaphosa public-acknowledgment posture; 30-year constitutional-democracy framework intact.
sector_context: Africa / functional-band cluster. Cross-reference: Botswana (recent assessment), Cape Verde (recent assessment), Namibia. South Africa distinguished by GNU coalition context + Madlanga Commission accountability mechanism + xenophobic-violence pattern + whistleblower-protection implementation gap.
open_actions_resolved: First baseline established with functional-band confirmation
Operation Dudula xenophobic violence pattern absorbed
Whistleblower-killing and bill non-passage pattern absorbed
Boundary case approved — downward pressure documented but functional band sustained
open_actions_carried: Watch: Whistleblower Protection Bill introduction and parliamentary progress
Watch: Madlanga Commission interim and final findings
Watch: Operation Dudula prosecution outcomes and any further migrant-harm incidents
Watch: GNU coalition stability and accountability dynamics
